mapper.select: SELECT id FROM attendance_record WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND record_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record(emp_id, record_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, created_at) VALUES (#{empId}, CURDATE(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id AS a_id, a.record_date AS a_date, a.clock_in_time AS a_clock_in, a.clock_out_time AS a_clock_out, a.status AS a_status, a.absent_hours AS a_absent_hours, a.leave_request_id AS a_leave_id,
l.leave_type AS l_type, l.start_time AS l_start, l.end_time AS l_end, l.days AS l_days, l.reason AS l_reason, l.final_status AS l_final FROM attendance_record a LEFT JOIN leave_request l ON a.leave_request_id = l.id AND l.final_status IN (0, 1) WHERE a.emp_id = #{eid} ORDER BY a.record_date DESC
